credentials.quote: Your trust is our greatest fuel

credentials.card2Desc: Registered and certified under Section 12A of the Income Tax Act for tax exemption
credentials.card4Desc: Incorporated as a Section 8 Company under the Companies Act, 2013

trust.card1Desc: Razorpay securely processes your payments with PCI-DSS Level 1 Encryption.

trust.card3Desc: Track every contribution through your personalised, real-time donor dashboard.

about.p1: When I started this journey, I was not simply building a company. I was answering a question that had troubled me for years: why, in a country of 1.4 billion people — with brilliant doctors, dedicated teachers, and parents who would do anything for their children — do we still lose so many to the preventable, the treatable, the entirely avoidable?
about.p2: The answer, I found, was not a shortage of care. It was a shortage of connection. Between the mother and the clinic. Between the school and the home. Between the child's health record and the doctor who needed to see it.
about.p3: WOMBTO18 was built to be that connection.
about.p4: The Foundation exists because the most vulnerable children — in underserved communities, in government schools, in families without the time or means to navigate a complex healthcare system — deserve exactly the same standard of integrated care that a well-resourced family in a major city can access. That is not charity. That is justice.
about.p5: We built this with discipline. Every rupee we receive is tracked to its purpose. Every programme we run is measured for its outcome. Every donor who trusts us with their contribution can see, in real time, exactly what their gift has done.
about.p6: Because trust is not something you ask for. It is something you earn — one transparent act at a time.
about.p7: We hold 12A and 80G certification. We are validated by TechSoup India and registered with NGO Darpan. And we are just beginning.
about.p8: I invite you — whether you are a donor, a partner, a volunteer, or simply someone who believes that every child deserves a healthy start — to join us. Not as a supporter. As a co-builder of something that will outlast all of us.

services.desc: From the moment of conception through adolescence, we unite healthcare, education, and environment.
services.prog1Desc: Prenatal stress reduction, bonding exercises, and birth-preparedness support for expecting mothers.
services.prog2Desc: One enrolled child, one geo-tagged tree planted — a first-of-its-kind carbon-neutral cohort model. (Available as an opt-in add-on.)
services.prog3Desc: Our 9-touchpoint structured reminder system ensuring no child misses a critical dose.
services.prog4Desc: Annual screenings, doctor-led camps, WASH education, and emergency readiness in our Health Promoting Schools.
services.prog5Desc: Hands-on disaster response and first-aid training led by real heroes on school campuses.
services.prog6Desc: Mental health and emotional regulation support tailored from prenatal stages right through to adolescence.

howDonation.heading: How Your Donation Works
howDonation.desc: A radical commitment to transparency. Every rupee is tracked from your account to a child's health outcome.
howDonation.step1Desc: You make a contribution. An 80G certificate is auto-emailed within 2 minutes.
howDonation.step2Desc: Designated funds are ring-fenced into a programme-specific bank wallet, with full allocation transparency on your dashboard.
howDonation.step3Desc: Track your contribution through our donor updates as programmes launch.

impact.heading: Numbers That Tell Our Story
impact.desc: Every number represents a life changed, a family empowered, and a community strengthened.

donorWall.heading: Our Generous Supporters
donorWall.desc: Recognizing the incredible individuals and organizations whose generosity makes our mission possible.

testimonials.heading: The Stories Behind the Numbers
testimonials.t1Quote: WombTo18 has been incredibly structured and practical, covering everything from health to learning in one place. Their simple tools and reminders have made life easier for both parents and teachers.
testimonials.t2Quote: WombTo18 has completely changed the way we look at student well-being. WombTo18 is the partner you need. This is not a program; this is a mission. Highly recommended.
testimonials.t3Quote: Best parenting support system. Reminders + milestones + easy guides = peace of mind. Very accurate immunization reminders. Never missed a vaccine after joining.
testimonials.t4Quote: WombTo18 helped our school create a culture of health, empathy, sustainability, and early habit formation. The modules are beautifully crafted, age-appropriate, and easy to integrate into daily routines. Their team handled everything - training, monitoring, implementation, and parent orientation. Most importantly, our children love the activities. From green cohort pledges to emotional well-being exercises to nutrition awareness, it feels like an upgraded version of schooling. Any school that wants long-term, measurable impact must adopt this.

cta.heading: Join the Movement
cta.desc: Whether you donate, volunteer, or partner as a corporate entity — you become a co-builder of an entire generation's future.
